name: echocial
description: Backend of Echocial. A mobile-first app for online reputation
author: Ahmed Derbala <ahmed.derbala@esprit.tn>

scripts.start:prod-pm2: npm run i && NODE_ENV=production pm2 start src/main.js -i max --node-args='--max-old-space-size=32000' -f
scripts.start:local-pm2: NODE_ENV=local pm2 start src/main.js -i max --node-args='--max-old-space-size=32000' -f && pm2 monit
scripts.start:pm: git pull origin main && npm run i && npm run start:code
scripts.start:first-time: cp src/config/config.sample.js src/config/config.js && npm run i && npm run start:local
scripts.push: npm run format && git add . && git commit -m
scripts.clean:ai: npm run clean:a && npm run i
scripts.clean:air: npm run clean:ai && npm run start:default
scripts.update: rm -r -f backups/* && cp package.json backups/package.json.backup && cp package-lock.json backups/package-lock.json.backup 2>/dev/null; true && mv node_modules backups/node_modules.backup 2>/dev/null; true && npm i -D npm-check-updates --force && ncu -u && npm run clean:air
scripts.restore: cp backups/package.json.backup package.json && cp backups/package-lock.json.backup package-lock.json && mv backups/node_modules.backup node_modules && npm run start:default
